title: Senior Software Engineer - Texas Instruments India International Enterprises - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Texas Instruments India International Enterprises - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Texas Instruments India International Enterprises in Chandigarh offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Texas Instruments India International Enterprises:
Texas Instruments India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Texas Instruments India International Enterprises!
